progress.verification: 4 deterministic tests passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed source
progress.behavior: Deployment authorization now has a reusable explicit decision model: deploy only when configuration is ready and deploy mode is requested; otherwise fail closed while still producing privacy-preserving evidence.

blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, then wire the execution plan into the workflow and dispatch it.
next_action: Wire build-deployment-execution-plan.mjs into cloudflare-pages-research.yml, expose an evidence-only dispatch mode, gate Wrangler on plan.deploy, and upload the execution plan with the proof packet.
